headline: Limoneira (LMNR) Reports Q1 Loss, Beats Revenue Estimates
summary: Limoneira (LMNR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -23.08% and +25.55%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: 3 Food Stocks With Big Yields. Why Wells Fargo Says Be Careful.
summary: Wells Fargo downgraded Conagra Brands, Campbell’s, and General Mills, warning inflation and sluggish consumption could pressure earnings even as their dividend yields top 6%.

headline: Wells Fargo downgrades Conagra, Campbell’s and General Mills on profit risks
summary: Investing.com -- Wells Fargo has downgraded shares of Conagra Brands, The Campbell's Company and General Mills to Underweight in a note on Thursday, warning that a combination of earnings pressure, elevated leverage and stretched dividend payout ratios leaves the group vulnerable to underperformance.

headline: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Arista Networks, Crocs, General Mills, GoDaddy, Jabil, Lumentum, MercadoLibre, Shopify, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower this morning, as issues in the Strait of Hormuz get murkier. Depending on how the oil situation is going, that is dictating market direction, and on Wednesday, there was no late-day rally to save the stock market, as the black gold was up 5%. headline: Does Conagra Brands' (CAG) Fayetteville Bet Reframe Its Margin-Focused Investment Narrative?
summary: Earlier this month, Conagra Brands announced a multi-year US$220,000,000 expansion of its Fayetteville, Arkansas facility to boost chicken production capacity and add more than 100 jobs over five years, reinforcing its protein-focused frozen meals portfolio across brands like Hungry-Man, Banquet, Healthy Choice, Gardein, and evol. This commitment to higher-value protein capacity comes just as investor sentiment toward packaged food peers has weakened following a competitor’s cautious...
